answers.supported_exploration: I really loved the connection between selecting things such as the damage type and then being able to see in a more detailed way the spells that had it. For example i was trying to copy a character from another game, and i felt it was easier to do so because i could more easily see which spells were psychic necrotic etc.
answers.blocked_exploration: I wish items in the build planner had more detailed descriptions. also maybe a list of all damage types or something, because i had to first find the first of the damage type, and only then i could select it to highlight.
answers.changed_normal_planning: I really like roleplaying, and i felt it was way easier now to select and filter stuff that i found necessary to the character i was trying to build.
answers.first_change: Id really like if terms that are more abstract were added to descriptions. like i was trying to build a gothic lovecraftian mad scholar, i wish arms of hadar had  a tag "eldritch" or something so that i could quickly find stuff that was relevant to that type of character flavor.
